author: tkrupa-intel

failed_jobs.name: Build / Build
failed_jobs.symptom: C++ compile error in GPU dynamic quantize unit test

failed_jobs.name: ci/gha_overall_status
failed_jobs.symptom: aggregate status failed because Build failed

recommended_actions: Add explicit scale dtype (data_types::f16) before zp_dt in the three failing test_dynamic_quantization calls and rerun Ubuntu 22 Build.
root_cause: GPU unit test helper signature has quant_dt, scale_dt, zp_dt before OutputStorageType on the merge ref, but new calls at dynamic_quantize_gpu_test.cpp:500/506/512 pass only two data_types values before OutputStorageType::Planar, causing a compile-time conversion error. Artifact/deb errors are secondary fallout.
title: GPU dynamic_quantize unit test fails to compile after target-branch merge
